---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for CryptoDash
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / use case

<!-- What are you trying to do that CryptoDash doesn't currently support, or doesn't support well? Concrete examples are best. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you like this to work? UI sketch, API shape, or a written description — whatever fits. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse. Optional but helpful. -->

## Scope

<!-- Which area(s) does this touch? Mark any that apply. -->
- [ ] New wallet type or address format
- [ ] New external data source (price feed, blockchain API, etc.)
- [ ] Dashboard widget or chart
- [ ] Wallet management (add / edit / remove / tag)
- [ ] Auth or session handling
- [ ] Settings / configuration
- [ ] Background refresh / scheduler
- [ ] Performance or operational
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, anything else useful. -->
